title: Build a consistent response envelope
prompt_md:
Every endpoint should return the same predictable shape so the frontend can write one response handler. Write `envelope(ok, data)`:

- when `ok` is truthy, return `{"ok": True,  "data": data}`
- when `ok` is falsy,  return `{"ok": False, "error": data}`

So on success `data` is the payload; on failure the same argument is treated as the error message.
hints: Branch on `ok` and choose the key name (`data` vs `error`).
Return a brand-new dict in each branch.
